MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc. is present. Represented by Issarah Cabera.
Attorney Margaret DeMatteo appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Aldred Yates is present.
Attorney Marilyn Underwood representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Barbara Anscher, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of JAN-28-2013 is vacated.
